def negative_pydantic_settings_model_missing_env_prefix_isolation():
    rule_id = "pydantic_settings_model_missing_env_prefix_isolation"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Pydantic BaseSettings model does not define env_prefix, mixing its env vars with system environment."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
